args.code:
import pandas as pd

business_data = locals()['var_function-call-3574335632165716513']
review_data = locals()['var_function-call-10046113097086129716']

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
df_review = pd.DataFrame(review_data)

df_review['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_review['rating'])

merged_df = pd.merge(df_business, df_review, on='gmap_id')

average_ratings = merged_df.groupby(['gmap_id', 'name'])['rating'].mean().reset_index()

top_5_businesses = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False).head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

top_5_businesses = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False).head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
